visual replay/context; not a dynamics source
Gazebo provides visual replay/context only; HCW remains the source of state.
Gazebo replay evidence: visual context only

ROS verifies that the offline trajectory, attitude stream, camera frustum, and logged safety/coverage signals are instantiated consistently during replay; HCW dynamics remain the source of spacecraft state.
